units.source_text: 1 2025年的⾦額包括完成向Rothesay Life plc和CCF組成的財團出售法國保留房屋及若⼲其他貸款組合後撥回與該組合相關的15億美元累計公允值虧損，以及集團於
units.translation_target_text: 1 Amounts for 2025 include the reversal of US$1.5 billion of accumulated fair value losses related to the French retained homes and certain other loan portfolios following completion of the sale to a consortium of Rothesay Life plc and CCF, as well as the Group's
units.translation_en: 1 Amounts for 2025 include the reversal of US$1.5 billion of accumulated fair value losses related to the French retained homes and certain other loan portfolios following completion of the sale to a consortium of Rothesay Life plc and CCF, as well as the Group's

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 1 Amounts for 2025 include the reversal of US$1.5 billion of accumulated fair value losses related to the French retained homes and certain other loan portfolios following completion of the sale to a consortium of Rothesay Life plc and CCF, as well as the Group's

units.source_text: 交通銀⾏的持股攤薄所導致的11億美元虧損（包括儲備撥回）。
units.translation_target_text: Losses of US$1.1 billion (including write-back of reserves) resulting from the dilution of Bank of Communications' shareholding.
units.translation_en: Losses of US$1.1 billion (including write-back of reserves) resulting from the dilution of Bank of Communications' shareholding.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Losses of US$1.1 billion (including write-back of reserves) resulting from the dilution of Bank of Communications' shareholding.

units.source_text: 2  包括就集團於交通銀⾏的投資確認減值虧損10億美元（2025年）及30億美元（2023年）。請參閱第319⾄322⾴附註18。
units.translation_target_text: 2 Including impairment losses of US$1 billion (2025) and US$3 billion (2023) recognized on the Group's investment in Bank of Communications. Please see note 18 on pages 319 to 322.
units.translation_en: 2 Including impairment losses of US$1 billion (2025) and US$3 billion (2023) recognized on the Group's investment in Bank of Communications. Please see note 18 on pages 319 to 322.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 2 Including impairment losses of US$1 billion (2025) and US$3 billion (2023) recognized on the Group's investment in Bank of Communications. Please see note 18 on pages 319 to 322.

units.source_text: 3 由於集團內之市場風險分散效應，風險加權資產並非各法律實體相加的總和。
units.translation_target_text: 3 Due to the diversification effect of market risks within the group, risk-weighted assets are not the sum of all legal entities.
units.translation_en: 3 Due to the diversification effect of market risks within the group, risk-weighted assets are not the sum of all legal entities.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 3 Due to the diversification effect of market risks within the group, risk-weighted assets are not the sum of all legal entities.

units.source_text: 4 款額按第三⽅集團綜合入賬基準計算。
units.translation_target_text: 4 The amount is calculated based on the consolidated accounting basis of the third-party group.
units.translation_en: 4 The amount is calculated based on the consolidated accounting basis of the third-party group.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 4 The amount is calculated based on the consolidated accounting basis of the third-party group.
